channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cape Verde's Historic World Cup Run and Fan Celebrations
item.description: Cape Verde's national football team returned home to an emotional heroes' welcome after their historic run at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The Blue Sharks, representing the least populous nation ever to r...

item.title: Paul Krugman analyzes Trump's cryptocurrency fraud and its economic impact
item.description: Nobel Prize-winning economist Paul Krugman has analyzed the scale of President Donald Trump's self-enrichment scams, particularly his role in a cryptocurrency 'meme coin' scheme that resulted in over ...

item.title: Soweto Entrepreneur Turns Failure into Successful Veggie Business
item.description: Malebo Moloto's journey from a failed online appliance business to a thriving veggie peeling enterprise highlights resilience and adaptability. After losing R150,000 during the pandemic, Moloto pivote...

item.title: Hamas Dissolves Gaza Governing Body, Paves Way for Technocratic Committee
item.description: Hamas has announced the dissolution of the Gaza Strip's governing body, marking a significant political shift. The move, led by Mohammed al-Farra's resignation, aims to transition power to the Nationa...

item.title: Exploring Authentic Santorini: Tips to Avoid Crowds and Discover Hidden Gems
item.description: The article highlights how Wendy Barker and her husband, Darren, transformed their Santorini vacation by following advice from a local travel agent. Instead of the usual crowded resorts and iconic vie...

item.title: OPEC+ raises output targets as oil prices drop amid geopolitical tensions
item.description: Oil prices fell by over 1% on Monday as OPEC+ agreed to increase output targets by 188,000 barrels per day starting August, following earlier hikes in June and July. However, the increase remains larg...

item.title: Legal Request for Financial Records in Sara Duterte Impeachment Case
item.description: The House prosecution panel has formally requested the Senate impeachment court to issue subpoenas compelling banks to disclose financial records of Vice President Sara Duterte and her husband, Manase...

item.title: WA Labor Faces Challenges in Secret Harbour Byelection
item.description: The sudden resignation of local member Paul Papalia has cast a shadow over the upcoming byelection in the southern suburbs electorate of Secret Harbour, with both WA Labor and the Liberals viewing the...

item.title: Morocco's OCP Faces Challenges Due to Hormuz Crisis and Import Reliance
item.description: The reopening of the Strait of Hormuz has alleviated pressure on global fertiliser markets, but it has also revealed the vulnerabilities of Morocco's phosphate giant, OCP. Led by Mostafa Terrab since ...

item.title: DSS Arrests Five for Hiding Former Governor Sylva's Location
item.description: The Department of State Services (DSS) has arraigned five individuals for concealing the whereabouts of former Bayelsa State Governor Timipre Sylva, who is wanted for allegedly financing a coup plot a...

item.title: The tragic death of Colombian footballer Andrés Escobar and its legacy in sports history

item.title: Fireworks Leave Lingering Environmental Pollution
item.description: A recent study published by the American Chemical Society highlights the environmental impact of fireworks beyond their immediate visual effects. Researchers found that fireworks contribute to air and...

item.title: Kenyatta University PhD Study Reveals How Kamiti Prison Design Affects Inmates' Mental Health

item.title: News Corp Australia Blocks Crawler Bots with Access Restrictions
item.description: The article discusses a technical issue faced by users attempting to access News Corp Australia websites, where automated crawler bots are being blocked by the publisher's software. The message explai...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Tie the Knot in Intimate Madison Square Garden Wedding

item.title: Retailer Pepkor challenges Capitec's banking dominance in South Africa
item.description: The article discusses the growing competition between Pepkor, a major South African retailer, and Capitec, a leading low-income bank, for control of the mass-market wallet. Capitec has long dominated ...

item.title: Political Scandal and Corruption Allegations Emerge in Government Oversight

item.title: Russian Attack on Kyiv Leaves at Least 12 Dead
item.description: A massive Russian missile and drone attack on Kyiv resulted in at least 12 deaths and over 50 injuries, according to Ukrainian officials. The assault, which occurred early Monday, targeted residential...
